glosses.es: viaje de vuelta; viaje de regreso
glosses.fr: trajet de retour; voyage de retour
glosses.pt: viagem de volta; viagem de regresso
glosses.hi: वापसी की यात्रा; लौटने का सफर

translations.en: The return trip takes three hours.
translations.es: El viaje de vuelta dura tres horas.
translations.fr: Le trajet du retour dure trois heures.
translations.it: Il viaggio di ritorno dura tre ore.
translations.pt: A viagem de volta leva três horas.
translations.hu: A visszaút három órát vesz igénybe.
translations.hi: वापसी की यात्रा में तीन घंटे लगते हैं.
translations.el: Το ταξίδι της επιστροφής διαρκεί τρεις ώρες.
translations.id: Perjalanan pulang memakan waktu tiga jam.
translations.ro: Drumul de întoarcere durează trei ore.
translations.ja: 帰りは3時間かかります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive verb expressing duration.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the following noun ('Stunden') in a measure phrase.
Plural noun; accusative; measure NP indicating duration; complement to the verb.

sentences.target: Ich buche die Rückfahrt gleich online.

translations.de: Ich buche die Rückfahrt gleich online.
translations.en: I’m booking the return trip online right now.
translations.es: Ahora mismo estoy reservando la vuelta por internet.
translations.fr: Je réserve le retour en ligne tout de suite.
translations.it: Sto prenotando il ritorno online adesso.
translations.ko: 지금 바로 온라인으로 돌아가는 편을 예약하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在就在网上预订回程。
translations.ru: Я сейчас бронирую обратную поездку онлайн.
translations.pt: Estou reservando a viagem de volta online agora.
translations.he: אני מזמין עכשיו את הנסיעה חזרה באינטרנט.
translations.tr: Şu anda dönüşü internetten rezerve ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đặt chuyến về trực tuyến ngay bây giờ.
translations.ar: أنا أحجز رحلة العودة عبر الإنترنت الآن.
translations.nl: Ik boek de terugreis nu meteen online.
translations.uk: Я зараз бронюю зворотну поїздку онлайн.
translations.hu: Most azonnal online foglalom a visszautat.
translations.hi: मैं अभी ऑनलाइन वापसी की यात्रा बुक कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Κάνω τώρα κράτηση για την επιστροφή στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Jeg bestiller returreisen på nett nå.
translations.id: Saya sedang memesan perjalanan pulang secara online sekarang.
translations.sv: Jag bokar hemresan online just nu.
translations.ro: Îmi rezerv acum online drumul de întoarcere.
translations.cs: Právě teď si online rezervuji zpáteční cestu.
translations.da: Jeg booker tilbageturen online lige nu.
translations.ja: 今オンラインで帰りの予約をしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular present; transitive.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'buche'.
Adverb of time; modifies the verb phrase to indicate immediacy.
Adverb of manner; indicates the medium of booking; modifies the verb.

sentences.target: Das Ticket für die Rückfahrt ist teuer.
sentences.reading: /das ˈtɪkɛt fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʁʏkˌfaːʁt ɪst ˈtɔʏ̯ɐ/

translations.de: Das Ticket für die Rückfahrt ist teuer.
translations.ipa: /das ˈtɪkɛt fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʁʏkˌfaːʁt ɪst ˈtɔʏ̯ɐ/
translations.en: The ticket for the return trip is expensive.
translations.es: El billete de vuelta es caro.
translations.it: Il biglietto per il ritorno è caro.
translations.pt: A passagem de volta é cara.
translations.nl: Het ticket voor de terugreis is duur.
translations.pl: Bilet na podróż powrotną jest drogi.
translations.el: Το εισιτήριο της επιστροφής είναι ακριβό.
translations.id: Tiket untuk perjalanan pulang itu mahal.
translations.ro: Biletul pentru drumul de întoarcere este scump.
translations.cs: Jízdenka na zpáteční cestu je drahá.
translations.ja: 帰りのチケットは高いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Neuter noun; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP expressing purpose/beneficiary.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner within the PP headed by 'für'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate.
Predicative adjective; complements the copula; describes the subject.

sentences.target: Er verschiebt die Rückfahrt auf morgen.

translations.de: Er verschiebt die Rückfahrt auf morgen.
translations.en: He is postponing the return trip to tomorrow.
translations.es: Él pospone la vuelta para mañana.
translations.fr: Il reporte le retour à demain.
translations.it: Sta rimandando il ritorno a domani.
translations.ko: 그는 돌아가는 일정을 내일로 미루고 있어요.
translations.ru: Он переносит обратную поездку на завтра.
translations.pt: Ele está adiando a volta para amanhã.
translations.vi: Anh ấy hoãn chuyến về sang ngày mai.
translations.ar: إنه يؤجل رحلة العودة إلى الغد.
translations.nl: Hij stelt de terugreis uit tot morgen.
translations.uk: Він переносить зворотну поїздку на завтра.
translations.hi: वह वापसी को कल के लिए टाल रहा है.
translations.nb: Han utsetter returreisen til i morgen.
translations.id: Dia menunda perjalanan pulang sampai besok.
translations.sv: Han skjuter upp hemresan till i morgon.
translations.da: Han udskyder tilbageturen til i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼は帰りを明日に延ばしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; transitive.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'verschiebt'.
Preposition (here with accusative semantics); introduces a temporal PP indicating target time.
Temporal adverb functioning as the complement of the preposition 'auf' (UD allows ADP > ADV complements).
